posts.caption:
Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab just dropped Inkling: a 975-billion-parameter open-weight model trained on 45 trillion tokens. It's a mixture-of-experts architecture that reasons natively across text, image, audio, and video — not one modality at a time, all at once. Open weights, multimodal-native, and it's out now.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AINews #OpenSource #MultimodalAI #ThinkingMachines #MirasMurati #GenerativeAI

story.title: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines releases Inkling, an open 975B-param multimodal model
story.dek: Thinking Machines Lab released Inkling, an open-weight mixture-of-experts model trained on 45 trillion tokens across text, image, audio, and video—reasoning natively across all modalities.

posts.caption:
Meta pulled the plug on Muse, its AI image generation tool — then issued regrets that critics say don't match how the product was actually built and rolled out. The gap between what Meta says and what it did is fueling a credibility conversation that's bigger than one tool. Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AITools #MetaAI #GenerativeAI #AICredibility #CreatorTools

story.title: Meta backtracks on Muse Image AI tool, raising credibility questions
story.dek: Meta scrapped its image generation tool; critics argue the company's stated regrets don't align with how it deployed and managed the product.

posts.caption:
Moonshot AI just dropped Kimi K3, an open-source model that's benchmarking alongside Claude and GPT — and markets felt it immediately. The Chinese lab's release is reigniting conversations about geopolitical AI competition and what open-weight frontier models mean for the industry's power balance.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AINews #MoonshotAI #KimiK3 #OpenSource #FrontierAI #AIMarkets

story.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 reaches frontier performance, rattles markets
story.dek: Chinese company Moonshot AI released an open-source model rivaling Claude and GPT, drawing competitive analysis and sparking concerns about geopolitical AI dynamics. Market reaction was immediate.

posts.caption:
Google Vids just got a serious upgrade. The app now lets you edit video through natural conversation via Gemini Omni — describe what you want, it happens. Plus: AI-generated personal avatars built from your own photos, audio, and video so you can star in content without picking up a camera.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#GoogleVids #GeminiAI #AIVideo #AvatarAI #CreatorTools #AIEditing

story.title: Google Vids adds Gemini Omni conversational editing and personal avatars
story.dek: Google Vids update enables natural-language editing via Gemini Omni and AI-generated personal avatars for video starring, supporting multi-modal input (audio, video, photos, text).

posts.caption:
Houdini 22 just landed, and Gaussian Splatting is now fully native — no third-party tools needed. SideFX built in end-to-end splat creation, editing, and animation alongside a redesigned UI and workflow upgrades for VFX, game dev, and procedural art. It's a meaningful leap for anyone building in 3D.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#Houdini #GaussianSplatting #VFX #3D #SideFX #AITools

story.title: Houdini 22 adds native Gaussian Splatting support and redesigned UI
story.dek: SideFX's major release brings native 3D Gaussian Splat creation, editing, and animation without third-party tools, plus workflow upgrades for VFX, game dev, and procedural art.

posts.caption:
Apple Intelligence just got cleared for China — but with a twist. Alibaba's Qwen AI model is powering the feature set across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS after Chinese regulators approved the partnership. It's Apple's biggest push into the Chinese market in years, built on local AI infrastructure.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AppleIntelligence #Alibaba #Qwen #AINews #TechNews #Apple

story.title: Apple Intelligence launches in China via Alibaba Qwen partnership
story.dek: China's regulator approved Apple Intelligence by integrating Alibaba's Qwen AI model into iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS, marking Apple's major expansion into a key market.
